concept.theme_description: Explore famous sites from around the world through your colors.

painting_approach.focus: Emotion and Impression Rather Than Detail
painting_approach.color_scheme: Inspired by the unique atmosphere of each landmark

composition.placement: Intertwining each landmark subtly to create a cohesive global atmosphere
composition.interaction: Colors overlapping and blending to symbolize the interconnectedness of world cultures

painting_approach.paper_choice: High-quality, cold-pressed watercolor paper to enhance paint absorption and blendability

concept.intended_impact: To evoke a sense of global unity and the emotional depth of each landmark, inviting viewers to an immersive sensory journey around the world.
